pageTimings.text: Some animals sleep in the day. They wake up at night. They are nocturnal.
An owl can see in the dark. It hunts at night. Twit-twoo!
A bat flies at night. It finds food in the dark. Bats eat insects.
A hedgehog snuffles in the dark. It looks for slugs and bugs.
A fox hunts at night. It has big ears. It moves quietly.
These animals come out at night. We are asleep when they are busy!
